maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right onto улица Паршина.

maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn right onto Живописная улица.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right onto Живописная улица.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn right onto улица Академика Бочвара.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn right onto улица Академика Бочвара.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right onto улица Академика Бочвара.

maneuvers.instruction: Turn left onto улица Маршала Новикова.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn left onto улица Маршала Новикова.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn left onto улица Маршала Новикова.

maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn left onto Новощукинская улица.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn left onto Новощукинская улица.

maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Keep left to take E 22.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Keep left to take E 22.

maneuvers.instruction: Take the М-11 ramp on the right toward  Химки.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Take the М-11 ramp on the right.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Take the М-11 ramp on the right toward  Химки.

maneuvers.instruction: Keep left to take М-11/«Нева» toward  Химки.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Keep left to take М-11.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Keep left to take М-11, «Нева» toward  Химки.

maneuvers.instruction: Take the exit on the right toward Лихачёвское шоссе/Долгопрудный.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Take the exit on the right toward Лихачёвское шоссе.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Take the exit on the right toward Лихачёвское шоссе, Долгопрудный.

maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Turn right.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Turn right.

maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Keep left at the fork.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Keep left at the fork.

maneuvers.instruction: Your destination is on the right.
maneuvers.verbal_transition_alert_instruction: Your destination will be on the right.
maneuvers.verbal_pre_transition_instruction: Your destination is on the right.
